summary: Tested Phase 1 Accounting Layer - Party Master and Sales Register. Fixed critical backend bug where log_activity function was not defined, causing 500 errors on party creation. All 20 backend tests now pass. Frontend UI tests confirm all features are working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: log_activity function was not defined in server.py - added helper function to log to audit_logs collection
FIXED: create_ticket endpoint referenced undefined variables customer_name and support_type - changed to use ticket_doc values
seed_data_creation: Created test parties with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Accounting Layer is fully functional. Party Master supports CRUD for customers/suppliers/contractors with GSTIN deduplication. Sales Register shows empty state correctly and invoice creation form has all required fields. Party Ledger shows opening balance entries. Migration endpoint works correctly.

party_master.create_customer: PASS - Creates party with customer type
party_master.duplicate_gstin_prevention: PASS - Rejects duplicate GSTIN with 400 error
party_master.view_party: PASS - Shows party details with balance info

migrate_customers.endpoint: PASS - Migration endpoint works, deduplicates by phone

ui_tests.party_master_page: PASS - Stats cards, tabs, search, buttons visible
ui_tests.view_party_dialog: PASS - Shows party details and balance
ui_tests.sales_register_page: PASS - Stats cards, filters, New Invoice button
ui_tests.create_invoice_dialog: PASS - Firm, Dispatch, Party dropdowns, line items, totals

features_tested: Party Master - Create new party with customer type
Party Master - Create party with supplier type and GSTIN
Party Master - Validate duplicate GSTIN prevention
Party Master - Migrate existing customers from tickets
Party Master - View and edit party details
Sales Register - List sales invoices (empty state)
Sales Register - Fetch dispatches without invoice
Sales Register - Create invoice form validation
Party Ledger - View ledger for a party (shows opening balance entry)
